official_ifs_requirements.requirement: DRIVE35 Collaborate 3 must support the UK automotive supply chain, future vehicle manufacture, ZEV technologies, jobs and investment.
DRIVE35 Collaborate 3 projects must be collaborative, late-stage R&D, 50 percent match funded, with a total eligible grant request from GBP2.5m to GBP20m.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official IFS Collaborate 3 page lines 97 and 110-119

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: DRIVE35 Collaborate 3 lead must be a UK registered business, collaborate with UK organisations, include a vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 supplier, and include at least one SME claiming grant.
DRIVE35 Scale Up lead or single applicant must be a UK registered business; research organisations and academics cannot lead or work alone.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official IFS Scale Up page lines 123-129

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: DRIVE35 Scale Up funding rates are capped by company size and require a credible ZEV manufacturing facility or scale-up investment case.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official IFS Scale Up page lines 212-220 and scope readback

local_evidence_readback.finding: Aureon conversion pack exists for a partner-led ZEV assurance work package, but it explicitly says partner, asset, deployment site and budget facts must be supplied by the lead partner.
Portal-ready text is staged language only; it does not evidence a vehicle manufacturer, Tier 1 supplier, SME consortium member, budget or match funding.
PDF pack exists for review and partner conversion, not final submission.
Earlier unlock audit found no R&A manufacturing facility or qualifying facility evidence.

drive_searches.result_summary: Returned unrelated tool and documentation files; no APC or DRIVE35 partner evidence.
Returned unrelated documents and technical files; no confirmed vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 supplier commitment.
Returned unrelated manuscripts and tool docs; no Tier 1 supplier evidence.
Returned unrelated docs; no vehicle manufacturer evidence.
Returned unrelated tooling docs and one account-statement title; no ZEV manufacturing facility, site or co-investment evidence.
Returned unrelated docs; no ZEV partner, facility, asset or budget evidence.

route_action.reason: DRIVE35 Collaborate 3 requires an eligible automotive/ZEV consortium with a vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 supplier, an SME claiming grant, eligible costs and 50 percent match funding. DRIVE35 Scale Up requires a credible ZEV manufacturing facility/site and co-investment case. Current Aureon evidence does not confirm those gates.

next_actions: Do not submit DRIVE35 Collaborate 3 directly as R&A from current evidence.
Use the staged conversion pack only to obtain a named vehicle manufacturer, Tier 1 supplier, SME claiming grant, project work packages, eligible costs and 50 percent match funding evidence.
Do not submit DRIVE35 Scale Up until a ZEV manufacturing facility/site, capex or scale-up investment plan and eligible applicant evidence are confirmed.
controls: No unsupported vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 supplier claim made
No unsupported SME consortium, budget, match funding, facility/site, capex or manufacturing claim made
No IFS portal mutation, external email, upload, partner invite or final submission performed
